PredatorXOrderEntryLT.Name: PredatorXOrderEntryLT
PredatorXOrderEntryLT.HistoricalNote: Use ONLY for Historical Backtest. Recommend turning 'OFF' when trading LIVE or PLAYBACK
PredatorXOrderEntryLT.ManualEntryNote: BuyHigh/SellLow buttons must use STANDARD FILL RESOLUTION
PredatorXOrderEntryLT.ColorIdentifierNote: Use only when Long and Short Tags are the same!
PredatorXOrderEntryLT.CustomExitSignalNote: AVOID using the same Tags for ENTRY and EXIT Signals. To Reverse on opposite Entry Signal, use the REV.OPP instead.
PredatorXOrderEntryLT.CustomSignalNote: Recommend to load only a few days with Frequent printing Signals
PredatorXOrderEntryLT.BarsAgoSignalWarning: BARS AGO '0' WARNING! Can miss trades if not used properly! See USER GUIDE! Will only scan current bar for signals. Ensure your indicator has signal while bar is still forming!
PredatorXOrderEntryLT.ScanBarWarningEntry: SCAN CURRENT BAR WARNING! Can miss trades if not used properly! See USER GUIDE! Will only scan current bar for signals. Ensure your indicator has signal while bar is still forming!
PredatorXOrderEntryLT.IndicatorNote: Visuals for Channels and Oscillators have been temporarily removed! They will still work to filter trades. Load indicator separately if you want a visual for now!
PredatorXOrderEntryLT.TimeNote: Time Filters can NOT go past Midnight! Add a second time Filter instead! First STARTS at 12:00am Last ENDS 11:59pm ======= Lowest Time Should be First!!
PredatorXOrderEntryLT.Author: TradeSaber(Dre)
PredatorXOrderEntryLT.HardResetWarning: WARNING: Use ONLY if instructed by TradeSaber support! This will clear the license and require re-activation.
